REMOVED FROM COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON OCT-02-2008. BRIEFING RE APPRAISAL SELECTION RECEIVED IN DEPT. 514. JUDGE THOMAS J. MELLON, JR., CLERK: V. MACK, NOT REPORTED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER WILKINS, DEANNA RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT WILLIAMS, LISA L. $1,340,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,340,000.00, THE QUITCLAIM DEED WAS A FORGERY, PETITIONER IS THEREFORE ENTITLED TO HAVE THE QUITCLAIM DEED CANCELLED. FEE TITLE TO THE 155 ARCH STREET, SAN FRANCISCO PROPERTY SHALL REVERT TO ITS PRIOR OWNER, AUDREY M. WILSON (DECEASED) AND TITLE OF THE PROPERTY VESTS IN THE NAME OF DEANNA WILKINS, ADMINISTRATOR OF THE ESTATE OF AUDREY M. WILSON. PETITIONER SHALL HAVE AND RECOVER THE POSSESSION OF THE PROPERTY AND SHALL RECOVER DAMAGES FROM RESPONDENT UNDER PROBATE CODE 859 IN THE SUM OF $1,340,000.00 IN LIEU OF PUNITIVE DAMAGES UNDER CIVIL CODE SECTION 3294. THE ACTUAL RECOVERY OF THE 155 ARCH STREET PROPERTY BY DEANNA WILKINS AS ADMINISTRATOR OF THE ESTATE OF AUDREY M. WILSON SHALL OPERATE AS A CREDIT OF $670,000.00 AGAINST DAMAGES AWARDED. THE COURT RETAINS JURISDICTION IN THIS MATTER UNTIL THE TERMS OF THIS JUDGMENT ARE COMPLIED WITH OR UNTIL FURTHER ORDER OF THE COURT. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER WILKINS, DEANNA RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT WILLIAMS, LISA L. $1,340,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,340,000.00, THE QUITCLAIM DEED WAS A FORGERY, PETITIONER IS THEREFORE ENTITLED TO HAVE THE QUITCLAIM DEED CANCELLED. FEE TITLE TO THE 155 ARCH STREET, SAN FRANCISCO PROPERTY SHALL REVERT TO ITS PRIOR OWNER, AUDREY M. WILSON (DECEASED) AND TITLE OF THE PROPERTY VESTS IN THE NAME OF DEANNA WILKINS, ADMINISTRATOR OF THE ESTATE OF AUDREY M. WILSON. PETITIONER SHALL HAVE AND RECOVER THE POSSESSION OF THE PROPERTY AND SHALL RECOVER DAMAGES FROM RESPONDENT UNDER PROBATE CODE 859 IN THE SUM OF $1,340,000.00 IN LIEU OF PUNITIVE DAMAGES UNDER CIVIL CODE SECTION 3294. THE ACTUAL RECOVERY OF THE 155 ARCH STREET PROPERTY BY DEANNA WILKINS AS ADMINISTRATOR OF THE ESTATE OF AUDREY M. WILSON SHALL OPERATE AS A CREDIT OF $670,000.00 AGAINST DAMAGES AWARDED. THE COURT RETAINS JURISDICTION IN THIS MATTER UNTIL THE TERMS OF THIS JUDGMENT ARE COMPLIED WITH OR UNTIL FURTHER ORDER OF THE COURT. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

Administrator'S Petition To Recover Property For Estate And To Determine Validity Of Settlement Agreement Interposed As Defense To Recovery
Off Calendar Jun-21-2010 Continued To Jul-19-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Charles Wolff and Naznin Challa for and with Deanna Wilkins. Nelson Wild Special Litigation Counsel for Deanna Wilkins. Edward Smith for Greenwich Investors. Lisa Williams in Propria Persona.

Ms. Williams objected to the settlement stating that she did nothing wrong and that she did not receive notice. Mr. Wolff argued that Ms. Williams had no standing. The Court stated that it wanted to see dismissals for the Cross-complaint and the underlying petition. Status for filing of said dismissals was set for July 19, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court granted the Petition to Approve the Settlement (subject to review of the proposed order).

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.

Off Calendar Sep-29-2009 Continued To Dec-22-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (155 Arch St., San Francisco, Ca 94132)
Off Calendar May-05-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Naznin Challa for and with Deanna Wilkins (Administrator). Lisa Williams interested person in Propria Persona.

Ms. Williams stated that her Father wanted to buy the house and raised objection to the sale of the house which was overruled. In addition, Ms. Williams offered the amount of the first overbid, but stated that she would not have the deposit for at least 3 weeks. Ms. Challa announced the terms of the sale for the record. The sale was confirmed at $561,000.00. An additional bond in the amount of $561,000.00 is required. The Court granted the petition, (signing the order for the same in open court).

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: Maria Lertora, CSR#11935. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.

Ex Parte Application For Order For Stay Of Execution
Off Calendar Nov-18-2008 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Naznin Challa for Deanna Wilkins (Administrator). Lisa Williams (Defendent).

Ms. Williams stated that she needed more time to obtain employment, to find a place to live, to obtain Counsel and that she filed an appeal. Ms. Naznin stated that the Court found that the Quitclaim deed was a forgery, that the first decision was made on July 2, 2008 and that the final decision was made on July 22, 2008. In additin, she stated that the final judgment was entered on October 14, 2008 and that Ms. Williams had over 4 months time to prepare. The Court denied the Petition For Order For Stay of execution.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Patrick Heard, CSR #11055. Clerk: R. Noguera/ J. Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.
